shakshi: The player used Joannah's dispatch network in their own voice — named declaration using the accused's infrastructure
The mine conditions, the children, the quota notices — all of it broadcast to everyone in Azonithia
Nexiott's narrative about the mines is publicly broken — the caravan order's story about itself cannot hold
Nexiott knows immediately who broadcast — the player's own voice, no ambiguity, no deniability
Joannah taken hostage by Nexiott — guilty by proximity, punished for her position, she had nothing to do with it
The Assassin order broke Joannah out with no trouble — their capability demonstrated quietly
Joannah is out and safe — the player carries the knowledge of what she paid for something she did not do
Open hostility with Nexiott — no more caravan contracts, no more missions, the relationship is public war
The player's alignment is a public fact in Azonithia — whatever ambiguity remained after 0024 is gone
